name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut into bite-size strips
9 oz Boneless, Skinless Chicken Breast Halves, cut into bite-sized strips
2. Wrap tortillas in foil. Place in a preheated oven set to 300°F. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until heated through.
3. Meanwhile, spray a large skillet with Pam cooking spray.
Add onion and garlic; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add red or green pepper; stir-fry for 1-2 minutes more or until veggies are tender-crisp.
5. Remove from skillet.
6. Add oil to the skillet.
Add chicken; stir-fry for 3-5 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
7. Return vegetables to the skillet.
8. Add salsa. Cook and stir until heated through.
9. To serve, divide chicken mixture evenly among tortillas. Top with shredded lettuce. Dollop with yogurt and sprinkle with green onion. Roll up tortillas and serve.
